data.title: XRP Plunges 4% As Leverage Drops 78%: What Is Going On?
data.description: XRP is experiencing a 4% decline despite Binance leverage ratios dropping by 78% from 0.59 in mid-July 2025 to 0.13 currently, signaling the flushing out of speculative positions and a reset in the derivatives market. The Leverage Unwind Binance's Estimated Leverage Ratio for XRP has significantly decreased from 0.59 to 0.13, reflecting the elimination of highly leveraged positions. Analysts ascertain this ratio by dividing an exchange's open interest by its coin reserves to gauge the average leverage utilized. Concurrently, XRP's open interest on Binance is at $375 million, notably lower than previous peaks in the past year. Amr Taha, a CryptoQuant analyst, noted, "The main takeaway is that speculative pressure has eased significantly." He added that "Binance's XRP derivatives market now looks much less overheated, potentially creating a cleaner setup for its next major move." The reduction in liquidation risk is seen as a positive outcome of this deleveraging process.

data.title: THE RITZ-CARLTON ORLANDO, GRANDE LAKES DEBUTS SIGNATURE EXPERIENCES -- BESPOKE IMMERSIONS FOR EVERY TRAVELER
data.description: A well-known luxury resort in Florida has introduced Signature Experiences, offering exclusive travel opportunities and unforgettable adventures for guests of all ages. Grande Lakes Orlando, a sprawling 500-acre resort that includes The Ritz-Carlton Orlando, has launched this new initiative.

data.title: illumend CEO Kristen Nunery: Most Companies Don't Have a COI Process--They Have an Accidental Risk Manager
data.description: Kristen Nunery, CEO of illumend, has introduced the concept of the "Accidental Risk Manager" in her latest piece. This role is commonly found in small to medium-sized businesses and is crucial in managing unforeseen risks. Nunery highlights the concerning issue of dysfunctional Certificate of Insurance (COI) workflows that are placing companies at substantial legal and financial peril. The article sheds light on the unrecognized exposure that businesses face due to these broken workflows, urging companies to take proactive measures to address this issue.

data.title: Woofie’s Featured on “Military Makeover with Montel” on Lifetime TV, Provides Special Care for Veteran Family’s Beloved Dog
data.description: A local business, Woofie’s, based in Ashburn, Virginia and Lake Worth, Florida, is set to appear on the television show Military Makeover with Montel on April 2. This opportunity will showcase Woofie’s to a national audience, providing significant exposure for the company. Military Makeover reaches an estimated viewership of millions, offering a platform for businesses like Woofie’s to gain widespread recognition. This spotlight on the show can lead to increased brand awareness and potentially drive up sales and clientele for Woofie’s.

data.title: Florida Teacher Honored as 2026 Extraordinary Educator for Classroom Innovation
data.description: Curriculum Associates has recently acknowledged educators for their student-centered teaching methods and successful utilization of i-Ready® resources. The recognized individuals will engage in a comprehensive national professional development and leadership initiative. This recognition was announced in Tallahassee, Florida on March 26, 2026, via a press release.

data.title: Debate Program at Fairmont Preparatory Academy Equips Students to Elevate Public Discourse Through Evidence, Nuance, and Respect
data.description: The Debate program at Fairmont Preparatory Academy in Anaheim, California, is emphasizing the importance of evidence-based reasoning amidst growing polarization in public discourse. This program, established in 2026, focuses on equipping students with the skills to tackle complex issues. The academy is dedicated to instilling critical thinking in its students rather than solely focusing on victories.

data.title: In crackdown, UK sanctions Xinbi crypto marketplace for selling personal data to fraudsters in SE Asia.
data.description: British authorities have identified a cryptocurrency platform operating in Chinese language that has been selling stolen personal data to fraudsters. The criminals are believed to be based in scam facilities in Southeast Asia. This operation has resulted in a significant number of people falling victim to fraud schemes. The UK is taking action against this illicit activity.

data.title: AWWA Report Finds Rising Drinking Water Infrastructure Costs and Other Needs Put Affordability at Risk
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, a report unveiled by the American Water Works Association indicates that the United States will need between $2.1 to $2.4 trillion within the next 25 years to improve its drinking water infrastructure and address other urgent requirements. This substantial financial demand will push the boundaries of the water sector.

data.title: Transit Technologies Appoints Magali Daumas as Vice President of Marketing to Advance Product Marketing, Brand & GTM Strategy
data.description: A highly experienced professional has been appointed to oversee product marketing, brand development, and go-to-market strategy for a rapidly expanding mobility technology lineup. They aim to drive innovation with a clear purpose and achieve significant results for agencies and communities. The appointment was made in Knoxville, Tennessee, as of March 26, 2026.

data.title: Openlayer Partners with Telefónica Tech to Deliver AI Governance and Observability Across Europe and Latin America
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 26, 2026, Openlayer, a prominent AI governance and observability platform, disclosed a partnership with Telefónica Tech aiming to provide comprehensive AI governance to regulated sectors. This collaboration will incorporate Openlayer's technology with Telefónica Tech's enterprise services. The venture is set to bring enhanced AI oversight to industries that require strict adherence to regulations, ensuring end-to-end governance. This strategic alliance is expected to significantly impact regulated industries, with potential implications for sectors such as finance, healthcare, and beyond. Stay tuned for updates on how this alliance transforms AI governance in regulated spaces.

data.title: XA Investments Appoints Lauren Michalak as Managing Director and Head of Product Development & Strategy
data.description: In Chicago on March 26, 2026, XA Investments LLC (XAI) revealed the appointment of Lauren Michalak as the managing director and head of product development and strategy. As a part of the Chicago-based alternative investment management and consulting firm, Michalak will oversee these areas for the firm’s exclusive closed-end funds. Additionally, she will support the firm’s interval fund consulting clients and research clients in her new role.
Sanoma Corporation bought its own shares on March 26, 2026.

data.title: EBX Is Now Part of ON EBX
data.description: A recent announcement reveals that ON EBX has transitioned into a specialized division of Cloud Software Group, exclusively offering the renowned EBX® Master Data Management platform. This strategic shift grants ON EBX a dedicated leadership personnel, a distinct engineering plan, and the freedom to explore cutting-edge AI solutions in data management. With the extensive resources of Cloud Software Group at their disposal, ON EBX is poised for significant advancements in the realm of Data Management. Their primary objective is to set the standard for the future of Data Management, offering unparalleled services to their clientele and stakeholders.
